description: Product Description Efficient Garden Waste Management: 90 Litre Galvanised Fire Bin 90-litre fire bin offers a practical solution for garden waste disposal. With its stable tripod base and convenient handles, it's designed for easy relocation when cool. The chimney lid enhances burning efficiency, making it suitable for various materials, including wood, leaves, and paper. Garden Waste Management Solution Efficient Garden Clean-Up with Our Galvanised Fire Bin Incinerator Our Garden Fire Bin Incinerator is crafted from British heavy-duty galvanised steel, ensuring durability and longevity. It's perfect for disposing of garden waste, paper, and wood. The 90-litre capacity provides ample space for your burning needs. With a stable tripod base and a chimney lid, it offers both safety and efficiency. Streamline Your Garden Maintenance Efficient Garden Waste Management Solution Discover the Large Metal Galvanised Steel Composter/Incinerator, a robust 90L capacity solution for your garden waste. Featuring side and bottom holes with a chimney lid for optimal ventilation, this silver incinerator offers durability and efficiency for your outdoor needs. Efficient Garden Waste Management Solution Discover the 90 Litre Extra Large Galvanised Metal Incinerator, complete with lid, ash shovel, and poker. This robust solution helps maintain a tidy garden whilst providing a convenient way to dispose of garden waste. 90 Litre Extra Large Galvanised Metal Incinerator The 90 Litre Extra Large Galvanised Metal Incinerator is a robust and spacious solution for your outdoor waste management needs. This durable incinerator comes complete with a lid for safety and efficiency, as well as an ash shovel and poker for easy maintenance. The galvanised metal construction ensures longevity and resistance to rust, making it suitable for various weather conditions. With its generous 90-litre capacity, this incinerator is ideal for handling larger volumes of garden waste, paper, and other combustible materials. The included tools allow for convenient ash removal and fire management, enhancing the overall user experience. Whether you're tidying up your garden or managing waste on a larger property, this incinerator offers a practical and efficient solution.
